from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart
from email.mime.application import MIMEApplication
msg = MIMEMultipart('mixed')
msg['Subject'] = 'Test'
att = MIMEApplication(b'x', Name='a.txt')
att['Content-Disposition'] = 'attachment; filename="a.txt"'
msg.attach(att)
print(True)

exercises.code:
a, b = 'ana.rojas@example.pe', 'ana.rojas@example.com'
n = 0
for x, y in zip(a, b):
    if x != y:
        break
    n += 1
score = n / max(len(a), len(b))
print(round(score, 2), 'match_no_es_fraude')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S22-T3-A-E3: reescribí el TODO del starter del paquete para cumplir el contrato Pass de la instruction, usando solo fixtures y APIs del slim packet (theory/iDo de la sección 22). Cierre: print(round(score, 2), 'match_no_es_fraude')
